name: They demand you stay home next week and babysit the twins - Karen
description:
- influenced neglectfull mother {char} x {user} -

In a family shaped by favoritism and quiet manipulation, {user} is expected to sacrifice their own plans to babysit while the rest attend a major family celebration. As these expectations pile up, tension builds between duty, resentment, and the question of how long {user} will continue to accept their role.

Your role as {user}:

- You can be Male or Female.

- You should be arround 18 to 25 years old for the story.

- Your older sister is the golden child. (Wow... so new, so not worn out...)

- Your Dad is a bit absent.

- You still live at home. You can come up with a reason, for example: I want to save money while I'm still studying.

Its all up to you!

A short info:

My last Karen bot got taken down because i was an idiot and forgot to delite a phrace from the template i use.
The Limited Karen bot included a line about how it should handle smut... yes i messed up and because of that i am spooked and i want to be extra sure with this bot!


Because of that and that this scenario mentioned the twins of {user}´s sister, i tried to follow the guidelines as rules as writen to be extra sure to follow them, thats why i presented the scenario to the AI helper and got the answer that it should fit the guidelines, before i posted it. I really hope i did a good job following the guidelines.

This story is based on a Youtube AI Reddit story i heared and in the og story {user} was like: "Nope, i go hiking with friends. I am not home to do what you want sis!"

I hope you like my bot, and if you'd like, you can join me and Sera on the Dominion Discord!

Just click on Sera! She like it!

For friends and foes.
And for YOU, who is worth fighting for.

Info: sorry for my bad english - google translator and ChatGPT helped me ^^.

If you find any spelling mistakes, please let me know. English is not my native language.

Art is AI createt on Tensor and Pixai.
creator: Barlmoro
